report.summary: Audited 4 new pages from today's build cycle, fixed component consistency issues on TON and SUI pages (added Breadcrumb + BackToTop), created 2 missing OG images, and added complete OpenGraph metadata.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: TON DeFi page: Replaced manual inline <nav> breadcrumb with reusable Breadcrumb component (adds BreadcrumbList structured data automatically)
SUI DeFi page: Replaced manual inline <nav> breadcrumb with reusable Breadcrumb component for consistency
TON DeFi page: Added BackToTop component (was missing, inconsistent with LST and RWA pages)
SUI DeFi page: Added BackToTop component (was missing, inconsistent with LST and RWA pages)
TON DeFi page: Added complete OpenGraph images array with dimensions (1200x630) and alt text to metadata
SUI DeFi page: Added complete OpenGraph images array with dimensions (1200x630) and alt text to metadata
TON DeFi page: Added publishedTime, modifiedTime, and authors to OpenGraph metadata
SUI DeFi page: Added publishedTime, modifiedTime, and authors to OpenGraph metadata
Fixed OG image references from .png to .svg to match actual file format (both pages)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-ton-defi-guide.svg (1200x630) — Dark theme with TON branding (#0088CC), Telegram Mini Apps flow diagram, key stats (TVL $150-300M, 1B+ users, 4.86% yield), protocol labels (STON.fi, DeDust, EVAA)

OG image: og-sui-defi-guide.svg (1200x630) — Dark theme with Sui branding (#6fbcf0), protocol TVL bar chart (Suilend $745M, Navi $723M, Momentum $551M, Cetus $255M), key stats ($2.6B TVL, +220% YoY, <400ms finality)

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Informational)
items: LST Comparison and RWA Yield pages: Properly use Breadcrumb + BackToTop components — no issues found
TON page uses <details>/<summary> for FAQ accordion (semantic HTML) while other pages use static divs — good pattern but inconsistent across site
SUI page renders FAQs via faq.mainEntity mapping instead of a simple array — works but differs from other pages
All 4 pages lack ARIA labels on interactive elements — noted for future accessibility sprint
All 4 pages have good responsive patterns: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4, overflow-x-auto on tables, flex-wrap on badges
